title: Atoz Diecast Car Transporter Set with 2 Sports Cars, Moving Parts, Kids Toy Vehicle Collection
features: COMPLETE SET: Each set includes a large car transporter truck with trailer and two detailed diecast sports cars in assorted vibrant colours
MOVING FEATURES: Functional transport trailer with adjustable ramps and multiple levels for loading and displaying vehicles
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Durable diecast metal construction with plastic components and smooth-rolling wheels for long-lasting play value
REALISTIC DETAILS: Authentic truck and sports car designs with detailed paint finishes, styled wheels, and true-to-life proportions
PERFECT SIZE: Ideal scale for collecting and play, with transporter measuring approximately 30 centimetres in length when fully assembled
description: Product Description The Diecast Transporter & Cars are free wheeling - the Transporter has moving parts, so that the cars can be loaded on and off the transporter. The Transporter & Cars will fit the majority of sets Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
